## Conventions

- **Opening a ticket:** create `docs/open-work/tickets/NNN-slug.md` with `status: ready`.
- **Picking up work:** flip `status: in-progress`, regenerate the index, commit together with first code change.
- **Landing:** set `status: done`, `landed-at: <sha>`, `landed-on: <date>`, move file to `docs/open-work/landed/YYYY-MM.md` (merge as an `## ` entry), regenerate the index, commit.
- **Parking:** set `status: parked`, `parked: <date>`, leave in place. Add a `## Log` entry explaining why.
- **Blocking:** set `status: blocked`, populate `blocked-by: [ids]`. The blocking ticket should reference it via `## Log`.
- **Every landing commit** regenerates this file via `just open-work-index`.
